Example view_document tool calls
=================================

Single page:
  view_document(reference_code="SE/RA/420422/01", pages="7")

Page range:
  view_document(reference_code="SE/RA/420422/01", pages="1-10")

Specific pages:
  view_document(reference_code="SE/RA/310187/1", pages="5,7,9")

With search highlight:
  view_document(reference_code="SE/RA/420422/01", pages="1-10", highlight_term="Stockholm")

The tool resolves the reference code to IIIF image URLs and ALTO XML text
layer URLs automatically via BrowseOperations. The structuredContent returned
to the View contains:

  {
    "image_urls": ["https://lbiiif.riksarkivet.se/arkis!R0001203_00007/full/max/0/default.jpg"],
    "text_layer_urls": ["https://sok.riksarkivet.se/dokument/alto/R000/R0001203/R0001203_00007.xml"],
    "page_numbers": [7],
    "highlight_term": "Stockholm",
    "reference_code": "SE/RA/420422/01"
  }

Test fixtures in this directory:
  - 30002056_00010.xml    ALTO v4, word-level (multiple <String> per TextLine)
  - 451511_1512_01_alto.xml  ALTO v4, line-level (single <String>, WC attribute)
  - 451511_1512_01_page.xml  PAGE XML (TextEquiv/Unicode, conf attribute)
  - R0001203_00010.xml    ALTO v4 from Transkribus (BASELINE, no Shape/Polygon)
  - 30002056_00010.jpg    Sample page image (word-level fixture)
  - 451511_1512_01.jpg    Sample page image (line-level fixture)
  - R0001203_00010.jpg    Sample page image (Transkribus fixture)
